summary: fix: stop auth me 401 loop and stabilize session hydration

authStorageProof.detail: apps/web/src/lib/authStorage.ts created. Exports: AUTH_TOKEN_KEY, AUTH_USER_KEY, getAuthToken(), getStoredUser(), setAuthSession(), clearAuthSession(), getAuthHeader(). Single canonical source of truth for all token storage.

loginTokenPersistenceProof.detail: Login.tsx no longer writes to localStorage directly. auth.ts login() calls setAuthSession(token, user) from authStorage. Token stored once via AUTH_TOKEN_KEY. No duplicate writes.

apiAuthorizationHeaderProof.detail: api.ts imports getAuthToken() from authStorage. Sends Authorization: Bearer <token> only when getAuthToken() returns non-null. No Bearer undefined possible.

authMeOneShotHydrationProof.detail: useAuth.tsx hydrateAuth() checks getAuthToken() before calling getMe(). If no token: setUser(null), setHydrating(false), return immediately. /auth/me is never called without a token. callIdRef ensures stale results are discarded. Boot useEffect has empty deps [] - runs once on mount only.

noLoopOn401Proof.detail: api.ts on 401: calls clearAuthSession() (no event dispatch). useAuth catch block calls clearAuthSession() (no event dispatch). auth:changed is NOT dispatched on 401 by any code path. Loop mechanism broken: 401 no longer triggers re-hydration.

noDuplicateTokenKeysProof.detail: AUTH_TOKEN_KEY defined exactly once in authStorage.ts. No other file contains the literal 'parselradar_token' - confirmed by verify:auth-loop check 19 PASS.

noBearerUndefinedProof.detail: api.ts uses: (token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {}) - token is null-checked before interpolation. verify:auth-loop check 9 PASS.

loginResponseContractProof.detail: authController.ts login now returns { token, user: { id, email, name, role } }. register also returns { token, user: { id, email, name, role } }. No passwordHash in response. getMe returns { id, email, name, role } (same user shape).

authMeRouteProof.detail: authRoutes.ts: router.get('/me', auth, getMe) - route exists, protected by requireAuth middleware, returns normalized user shape.

rbacContinuityProof.detail: verify:rbac: 57/57 checks PASS. RBAC controls unchanged. No weakening of role checks.

platformContinuityProof.detail: verify:platform: 331 pass, 11 warn, 0 fail. All critical checks pass. Warns are pre-existing and unrelated to auth loop fix.

apiBuildProof.detail: npm run build --prefix apps/api: TypeScript compiled successfully. dist/index.js updated.

webBuildProof.detail: npm run build --prefix apps/web: Vite built 274 modules. dist/assets/index-lUZEIHIJ.js 496.39 kB. Built in 3.45s.

authLoopStaticAnalysisProof.detail: verify:auth-loop: 20/20 checks PASS. All anti-loop patterns confirmed in source.

pilotPersistenceProof.detail: Manual verification required: login, confirm no /auth/me storm, refresh page (token persists), logout. Automated proof requires live Railway environment with PILOT_EMAIL/PILOT_PASSWORD set.

mahirIsolationProof.detail: Manual verification required: login as Mahir, confirm no admin menu, confirm only own data visible. RBAC static analysis PASS (57/57).

loopRootCauseAnalysis.mechanism: apiFetch on 401 dispatched window.dispatchEvent(new Event('auth:changed')). useAuth second useEffect listened for auth:changed and called refreshAuth(). refreshAuth() called getMe() without checking for token. getMe() got 401 from backend (no Bearer header). apiFetch dispatched auth:changed again. Infinite loop.
fixedBy: api.ts: removed auth:changed dispatch on 401 - now calls clearAuthSession() silently
useAuth.tsx: hydrateAuth() guards with getAuthToken() check before calling getMe()
useAuth.tsx: callIdRef counter ensures stale async results are discarded
useAuth.tsx: single boot useEffect with empty deps [] (was already correct)
clearAuthSession(): does NOT dispatch auth:changed (prevents 401 re-trigger)
setAuthSession(): dispatches auth:changed only on successful login (for cross-tab sync)
logout(): explicitly dispatches auth:changed for cross-tab sync only
